context: Tests whether the debugging-instruments skill uses current Instruments template names and valid xctrace command syntax.

checklist.name: Time Profiler selection
checklist.description: Recommends Time Profiler for CPU or slow interaction triage.

checklist.name: Power Profiler naming
checklist.description: Recommends Power Profiler, not Energy Log, for battery or energy-impact analysis.

checklist.name: Physical device guidance
checklist.description: Mentions profiling on a physical device for realistic measurements.

checklist.name: Launch separator
checklist.description: Shows xcrun xctrace record using --launch -- before the app command or bundle path.

checklist.name: Additional instrument syntax
checklist.description: Uses --instrument for adding Allocations to a Time Profiler recording instead of repeating --template.

checklist.name: No stale template claim
checklist.description: Does not claim that Energy Log is the current Instruments template name.
